channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Trump administration orders ICE to suspend most vehicle stops after two deadly shootings: AP source
item.description: Trump administration officials have told Immigration and Customs Enforcement officers to suspend most vehicle stops after two deadly shootings in little over a week, according to a person familiar with the matter.

item.title: What it means when federal authorities say cars are being weaponized
Busy wildfire season tests US fire bosses as they juggle resources to stay ahead
